title: LAA-SFCI AF Stratifier: A TEE-Based Left Atrial Appendage Structure-Function Coupling Calculator
description: An offline, single-page web tool that computes candidate left atrial appendage structure-function coupling indices (LAA-SFCIs) from transesophageal echocardiography (TEE)-derived parameters and displays an auxiliary atrial fibrillation (AF) disease-stage profile based on study-derived parameter patterns. The principal index is LAA-VI/LAA-GLS. For research and educational use only; it is not a medical device and has not been validated for clinical diagnosis or treatment decisions. Displayed stage values are parameter-profile similarity scores from a single-center, cross-sectional study, not individual diagnostic probabilities.
